::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Math

- <img src='Published/Math/bayesian_inference/bayesian_inference.gif' width='20' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 5px;'/>[ベイズ推論](Published/Math/bayesian_inference/1.md)

- <img src='Published/Math/information_geometry/information_geometry.jpg' width='20' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 5px;'/>[情報幾何学](Published/Math/information_geometry/1.md)

- <img src='Published/Math/equilibrium_stat_mech/equilibrium_stat_mech.jpg' width='20' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 5px;'/>[平衡系統計力学](Published/Math/equilibrium_stat_mech/1.md)

:::



:::
